templates.name: React + TypeScript Web App
templates.description: Multi-user web app with React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind, pre-configured auth and PopDB integration
templates.displayDescription: Build a web app with a database where people can sign up, log in, and use your product. Great for SaaS tools, dashboards, marketplaces, or any app with multiple users.
templates.useCase: Web apps with user signup, login, and per-user data

templates.name: TypeScript Agent
templates.description: AI agents, automations, and event-driven pipelines with TypeScript handlers, pre-configured with AI, integrations, and database access
templates.displayDescription: Build automations, AI agents, or background workflows with a database that run on a schedule or respond to events. Great for bots, data pipelines, notifications, and internal tools.
templates.useCase: AI agents, automations, cron jobs, webhooks, and multi-step pipelines

templates.name: TypeScript Agent + React Web App
templates.description: Agent-mode app with React + TypeScript + Vite frontend and server-side event handlers, pre-configured with auth, AI, integrations, and database access
templates.displayDescription: Build an AI agent or automation that also has a web dashboard. Great for admin panels, monitoring dashboards, internal tools, or any automation that needs a UI.
templates.useCase: AI agents and automations with a web UI for monitoring, configuration, or data visualization
